name: ColorPicker
description: Pick colors in hex(a), rgb(a), hsl(a) and hsv(a) formats
searchText: colorpicker pick colors in hex(a), rgb(a), hsl(a) and hsv(a) formats @mantine/core /core/color-picker alphalabel defaultvalue focusable format fullwidth hiddeninputprops huelabel name onchange onchangeend oncolorswatchclick saturationlabel size swatches swatchesperrow value withpicker

props.name: focusable
props.description: If set, interactive elements (sliders thumbs and swatches) are focusable with keyboard

props.name: format
props.description: Color format. hexa, rgba, hsla values render alpha channel slider

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: If set, the component takes 100% width of its container

props.name: hiddenInputProps
props.description: Props spread to the hidden input

props.name: name
props.description: Hidden input name attribute, if not set, the input will not be rendered

props.name: onChangeEnd
props.description: Called when the user stops dragging one of the sliders or changes the value with keyboard

props.name: onColorSwatchClick
props.description: Called when one of the color swatches is clicked

props.name: swatches
props.description: A list of colors used to display swatches list below the color picker

props.name: withPicker
props.description: If false, the component displays only swatches
